message:
Add yamllint support and sort formatters alphabetically

- Add yamllint for .yaml/.yml files
- Remove yaml/yml from prettier (use yamllint instead)
- Sort formatter blocks alphabetically by tool name

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,17 +25,6 @@ if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(cmake|CMakeLists\.txt)$ ]]; then
   fi
 fi
 
-# -i 2: indent with 2 spaces
-# -ci: indent switch cases
-# -bn: binary ops may start line
-if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(sh|bash)$ ]]; then
-  if command -v shfmt &>/dev/null; then
-    shfmt -i 2 -ci -bn -w "$FILE_PATH"
-  else
-    echo "shfmt not found, skipping auto-formatting" >&2
-  fi
-fi
-
 if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(md|mdx)$ ]]; then
   if command -v markdownlint &>/dev/null; then
     markdownlint "$FILE_PATH" --fix
@@ -44,10 +33,29 @@ if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(md|mdx)$ ]]; then
   fi
 fi
 
-if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(md|mdx|json|yaml|yml)$ ]]; then
+if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(md|mdx|json)$ ]]; then
   if command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then
     prettier --write "$FILE_PATH"
   else
     echo "prettier not found, skipping auto-formatting" >&2
   fi
 fi
+
+# -i 2: indent with 2 spaces
+# -ci: indent switch cases
+# -bn: binary ops may start line
+if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(sh|bash)$ ]]; then
+  if command -v shfmt &>/dev/null; then
+    shfmt -i 2 -ci -bn -w "$FILE_PATH"
+  else
+    echo "shfmt not found, skipping auto-formatting" >&2
+  fi
+fi
+
+if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(yaml|yml)$ ]]; then
+  if command -v yamllint &>/dev/null; then
+    yamllint "$FILE_PATH"
+  else
+    echo "yamllint not found, skipping linting" >&2
+  fi
+fi
